product.title: Redragon KG010: Full-Size Mechanical Gaming Keyboard with Tactile Brown Switches & White LED Backlight
product.body_html:
Elevate your gaming and typing experience with the Redragon KG010, a full-size mechanical keyboard designed for durability and precision. Equipped with dust-proof brown switches for tactile feedback, white LED illumination with multiple modes, and a robust aircraft-grade aluminum frame, this keyboard combines performance with style for everyday use.

key features

  • Dust-Proof Brown Mechanical Switches - Provide quiet, tactile keystrokes with a 50 million click lifespan, ideal for accurate typing and responsive gaming without distractions.
  • White LED Backlighting with 9 Modes - Offers customizable lighting effects and adjustable brightness for enhanced visibility in low-light setups and personalized aesthetics.
  • 100% Anti-Ghosting & N-Key Rollover - Ensures every key press registers accurately during intense multi-key actions, preventing missed inputs in fast-paced games.
  • Aircraft-Grade Aluminum Build - Delivers exceptional durability and stability, with a splash-resistant design to withstand accidental spills and heavy use.

key specifications

Feature Specification
Switch Type Dust-Proof Brown Mechanical (Tactile, Quiet)
Backlighting White LED, 9 Modes, Adjustable Brightness
Layout Full-Size 104 Keys, Including Numpad
Anti-Ghosting 100% N-Key Rollover
Multimedia Keys 11 Dedicated
Special Features Interchangeable WASD/Arrow Keys, Windows Key Lock, Splash-Resistant
Build Material Aircraft-Grade Aluminum Top Plate + ABS Body
Keycaps Crystalline Scratch-Resistant
Connectivity USB Wired (Plug-and-Play)
Dimensions Approx. 432 × 178 × 38 mm
Weight Approx. 1035 g
Compatibility Windows 10/8/7/Vista/XP; Limited Mac OS Support

* Specifications may vary by region and model variant.

performance excellence

The Redragon KG010 excels in demanding gaming scenarios with its full N-key rollover and anti-ghosting technology, allowing seamless execution of complex commands without lag or errors. The brown switches offer a balanced actuation force for quick responses, making it suitable for FPS, MOBA, and strategy games while maintaining precision for productivity tasks.

user experience & comfort

Ergonomic design with non-slip feet and an angled layout reduces wrist strain during extended sessions, promoting comfort for both gaming marathons and office work. The quieter tactile switches minimize noise, enhancing usability in shared environments, while interchangeable keys and Windows lock add convenience for customized setups.

design & build quality

Constructed with a sturdy aircraft-grade aluminum top plate and reinforced ABS base, the KG010 withstands rigorous daily use while maintaining a sleek, professional appearance. Scratch-resistant keycaps and splash-proof features ensure longevity and easy maintenance, blending rugged reliability with a clean aesthetic.

connectivity & compatibility

  • USB Wired Connection – Plug-and-play setup with a durable cable for stable, low-latency performance.
  • Compatible with Windows 10/8/7/Vista/XP – Full functionality on major Windows versions; limited support for Mac OS, ensuring broad device compatibility.

perfect for

  • Competitive Gaming – Tactile brown switches and anti-ghosting shine in fast-paced titles, compatible with Windows PCs for immersive play.
  • Office Productivity – Quiet keystrokes and ergonomic design support long typing sessions, with limited Mac compatibility for versatile use.
  • Budget Enthusiasts – Durable build and customizable lighting offer premium features at an affordable price point.

why choose this product

Opt for the Redragon KG010 to get a reliable mechanical keyboard that balances gaming performance with everyday usability, featuring tactile switches and robust construction that outlast cheaper alternatives. Its value-packed design, including anti-ghosting and splash resistance, makes it a smart choice for users seeking quality without overspending.

frequently asked questions

Q: Is the Redragon KG010 compatible with Mac?

A: Yes, it offers limited support for Mac OS, with basic keyboard functions working, though some multimedia keys may be Windows-optimized.

Q: How do I adjust the backlight?

A: Use the FN + lighting keys to cycle through 9 white LED modes and adjust brightness levels directly on the keyboard.

Q: Does it have anti-ghosting?

A: Yes, it features 100% anti-ghosting with N-key rollover for accurate multi-key presses in gaming.

Q: Are the switches hot-swappable?

A: No, the KG010 uses soldered dust-proof brown switches (non-hot-swappable).
